lines.speaker: Assistant Stan
lines.text: Do you want to use the balloon? Just so you know, some locations require special logs and high Firemaking skills.

lines.speaker: Assistant Stan
lines.text: Weapons are not allowed on Entrana. I must search you first.

lines.speaker: Assistant Stan
lines.text: I'm sorry, no weapons or armour may be worn to Entrana. Come back when you have laid them down.

lines.speaker: Assistant Stan
lines.text: I am Stan. Auguste hired me to look after this balloon. I make sure people are prepared to fly.

lines.speaker: Assistant Stan
lines.text: Do you want to use the balloon?
